dts.title: Southampton Maybush test centre: 20-week wait — here's how to skip the queue
dts.hook: Open with the DVSA booking screen showing a test date in late 2026, then cut to drivingtestswap.uk confirming a swap within days. Tap into the frustration of learners already booked and waiting.

dts.title: Why DVSA waiting times hit 20+ weeks — and the legal trick most learners don't know
dts.hook: Use on-screen text showing the worst UK waiting times (Bolton 23 wks, Southampton 20 wks) then explain the DVSA's own cancellation-swap system and how DTS automates it, ending with a CTA.

athletics.title: Calisthenics to sprint carryover — what the gym reps are doing to my start
athletics.hook: Film a superset of weighted pull-ups or ring dips in the gym, then cut to the track showing a 30m acceleration split — let the numbers do the talking.

athletics.title: Track Tuesday: breaking down my drive phase
athletics.hook: Slow-motion footage of the first 10m of a sprint with text overlays calling out foot strike, hip height, and arm drive — positions Dowayne as a knowledgeable athlete-creator.

aimybiz.title: I let an AI coach handle objection training for our sales team for 30 days — here's what changed
aimybiz.hook: Screen-record a CloseCoach session (prospect persona + live objection response + AI feedback) then cut to a before/after on a simple metric like objection-to-close rate. Tag relevant sales leaders.

aimybiz.title: 3 objection-handling mistakes I hear from SME sales reps every week
aimybiz.hook: Share three real (anonymised) patterns — e.g. over-explaining, premature discounting, not asking 'why' — then close with: 'We built CloseCoach specifically to fix these. DM me if you want to see it in action.'
